name: Extract Expenses from Emails and Add to Google Sheets
description: Searches Gmail for expense-related emails (receipts, invoices), uses Claude AI to extract expense data (date, amount, vendor, category), and appends structured rows to a Google Sheet for tracking.

source.originalName: Extract expenses from emails and add to Google Sheets

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading emails

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for expense tracking

searchQuery.default: subject:(receipt OR invoice OR expense OR payment) newer_than:7d
searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to find expense emails

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for expense summary notification

steps.name: Fetch details for each expense email
Extract email subjects and bodies for AI processing
Build Claude prompt for expense extraction
Extract expense data with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build rows for Google Sheets from extracted expenses
